# Explainers

Concept pages that help you read the specimens: formation processes, geological
periods, identification methods, and the difference between what a photograph can show
and what only a physical test can settle.

Each explainer exists because multiple specimens in the archive need it — they are
written from the collection outward, not copied from a textbook inward.
